title: The 10 Pittsburgh Sweets on Social
subtitle: Bakeries, pastry shops, ice cream, dessert
angle: which Pittsburgh dessert businesses are showing up online this spring, ranked by creator pickup. Who creators are filming and what those videos reveal.
intro:
Pittsburgh's dessert businesses are getting filmed whether they're ready or not. This spring, creators across TikTok and Instagram made 1.8 million plays happen for Kyo Matcha in Squirrel Hill, a number that would be a straightforward success story if the sentiment backed it up. It doesn't, which tells you something about the gap between virality and reputation. Meanwhile, Page's in Arlington sits on 3,145 reviews and a base of thirteen active creators producing content the business itself hasn't touched. That combination of earned trust and unclaimed attention is rare and worth watching.

What the rankings this quarter keep revealing is a split between businesses that built their standing on reviews and businesses that stumbled into creator momentum. La Gourmandine earned the number one bakery spot on 1,294 reviews while its own feed went quiet. Millie's leads ice cream by the same logic: reviews built the position, but half a million TikTok plays ran without them.

The pattern going into summer is clear. The businesses that close that gap, that meet creator attention with their own voice, will look very different in the Issue 02 rankings. The ones that don't will still be getting filmed.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Second In Desserts, Powered By 1.8 Million Creator Plays. Sentiment Is The Gap.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap now. At 67 against a family median of 83, sentiment is the single axis holding this ranking down; address the portion consistency and closing-time complaints explicitly in responses to flag those patterns to future reviewers.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Second In Ice Cream, Carried By Creators. The 0.49% Engagement Rate Is The Real Story.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion-price complaint directly. Portion size criticism appears in at least 2 of 8 sampled reviews and is the clearest drag on sentiment below the family median of 83.

items.name: Treat - Ice Cream and Liege Waffles
items.descriptor: Third In Ice Cream, Built On Creator Attention. The Business Has Yet To Meet It.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim a TikTok presence now. Thirty-two creators generated 1.1 million plays this quarter with no account to land on; creating a profile captures that traffic before it dissolves.

items.name: Millie's Homemade Ice Cream
items.descriptor: Number One In Ice Cream, Built On Reviews. Half A Million TikTok Plays Ran Without Them.

featured_tiktok.author: nonazgonenutz
featured_tiktok.caption: #Mandelaeffect #Dreyers #edys #wtf Messing with my ice-cream is a No NO

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok presence creators already built. Launch a Millie's TikTok account to capture the 578,817 plays and 25 creators already filming the shop each quarter.

items.name: La Gourmandine Hazelwood
items.descriptor: First In Pastry, Carried By Creators. The Bakery's Own Feed Has Gone Quiet.
items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram feed now. The account has posted zero times in 41 days; one post per week featuring a specific pastry by name would reopen the momentum signal immediately.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Sweets, Backed By 3,145 Reviews. Thirteen Creators Are Producing Content Page's Hasn't Claimed.
items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok home for existing buzz. Thirteen creators have posted 177,416 plays this quarter with no owned account to land on. Claim the handle and repost the top-performing creator content.

items.name: La Gourmandine Lawrenceville
items.descriptor: Number One Bakery In Pittsburgh, Carried By 1,294 Reviews. The Feed Has Gone Quiet.

featured_tiktok.author: mattdinguspgh
featured_tiktok.caption:
Welcome to 337 Fisk Street in Lawrenceville, Pittsburgh. This iconic 1900 residence spans nearly 4,000 square feet, blending historic soul with modern luxury. 

https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/337-Fisk-St-Pittsburgh-PA-15201/11514118_zpi

items.playbook_top_move: Restart Instagram before the momentum disappears. The account has been dormant 41 days. Two posts per week, focused on the pastry case and seasonal specials, directly addresses the lowest signal in the family.

items.name: Waffallonia
items.descriptor: First In Dessert On The Waffles Alone. The Instagram Has Not Shown Up Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Convert the Instagram to a business account. The account has no bio, no post cadence, and is not flagged as a business, fixing all three is a single afternoon of work that unlocks analytics and creator tagging.
